visual_continuity.notes: The Saved screen preserves the current Tech Context Radar identity: deep black canvas, mint accent, pill navigation, glass panels, soft borders, rounded cards, and calm premium SaaS density.

hierarchy.notes: The page now reads as a saved intelligence library: title and subtitle first, search and filters second, then grouped cards for Recent, This week, and Older. Card metadata stays compact and scannable.

product_specificity.notes: The cards focus on developer impact and why each signal matters rather than bookmark-style storage. Categories match the product domains: AI, DevTools, Frameworks, Cloud, and Security.

interaction.notes: Search, category filters, remove actions, empty state, navigation, and toast feedback are wired. Removing all visible cards reveals the requested empty state with a View Today's Radar CTA.

responsive_behavior.notes: The shared two-column layout collapses to a single-column saved library at mobile widths, and card controls stack at the smallest breakpoint. Rendered viewport inspection was not available in this run.

accessibility.notes: The top navigation keeps one active Saved state, controls have explicit button types, search has an accessible label, filters expose aria-pressed state, and the library updates through an aria-live region.

verification.notes: Checks passed for JavaScript syntax, CSS brace balance, critique JSON, duplicate IDs, button types, local links, active nav count, required Saved content, filter hooks, remove hooks, and empty-state hooks.
